reviews.comment:
Fui un día a hacer un trámite que necesitaba hace tiempo pero no me podía organizar para ir. Llego y así sobradamente me dicen no hay sistemas volvé la semana que viene. Ante mi queja me dijeron sino anda a pilar que hay otra oficina. Nah tranquilo estoy al pedo en mi vida y puedo ir a pilar olivos etc a tu conveniencia. Muy mala predisposición y prepotencia. Tampoco atienden el teléfono para verificar si hay sistema y no volver a ir sin sentido.

(Translated by Google)
I went one day to take care of some paperwork I'd needed for a while but couldn't seem to find the time. When I arrived, they casually told me the system was down and to come back next week. When I complained, they told me to go to Pilar instead, as there was another office there. "Nah, relax," I said, "I'm bored and I can go to Pilar, Olivos, or wherever you like." Very unhelpful and arrogant. They don't even answer the phone to check if the system is working, so I don't have to make another pointless trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3398041021459195715/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwbGQ3LXVnRRAB
